message:
refactor(demo_showcase): RwLock to parking_lot migration

Migrate demo_showcase pages from std::sync::RwLock to parking_lot::RwLock:
- dashboard.rs, docs.rs, files.rs, logs.rs
- parking_lot locks don't poison, simplifying error handling
- Read guard acquisition no longer needs .unwrap() calls

Also updates Cargo.lock with parking_lot dependency and syncs issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
